description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Add the cheapest blog theme costing $39 or less with at least 4 stars and one-click demo import to your cart using a single-site license.
tasks.name: Add the cheapest blog theme costing $39 or less with at least 4 stars and one-click demo import to your cart using a single-site license.
tasks.description: Add the cheapest blog theme costing $39 or less with at least 4 stars and one-click demo import to your cart using a single-site license.

tasks.instruction: Among WooCommerce shop themes priced under $60, compare the first two results by sales or downloads and add the one with the higher sales to your wishlist.
tasks.name: Among WooCommerce shop themes priced under $60, compare the first two results by sales or downloads and add the one with the higher sales to your wishlist.
tasks.description: Among WooCommerce shop themes priced under $60, compare the first two results by sales or downloads and add the one with the higher sales to your wishlist.

tasks.instruction: Purchase a multipurpose/agency theme that supports both Elementor and WooCommerce, is rated at least 4.5 stars, costs between $49 and $79, using a multi-site license and applying the coupon code 'AGENCY20' at checkout.
tasks.name: Purchase a multipurpose/agency theme that supports both Elementor and WooCommerce, is rated at least 4.5 stars, costs between $49 and $79, using a multi-site license and applying the coupon code 'AGENCY20' at checkout.

tasks.instruction: Add three photography-focused portfolio themes under $50 released within the last 12 months to the comparison tool.
tasks.name: Add three photography-focused portfolio themes under $50 released within the last 12 months to the comparison tool.
tasks.description: Add three photography-focused portfolio themes under $50 released within the last 12 months to the comparison tool.

tasks.instruction: Add one blog theme tagged for fast loading or performance with a yearly license and one blog theme tagged for newsletter or email signup with a lifetime license to your cart.
tasks.name: Add one blog theme tagged for fast loading or performance with a yearly license and one blog theme tagged for newsletter or email signup with a lifetime license to your cart.
tasks.description: Add one blog theme tagged for fast loading or performance with a yearly license and one blog theme tagged for newsletter or email signup with a lifetime license to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Get the highest-rated free theme compatible with the Gutenberg editor and add it to your library or cart.
tasks.name: Get the highest-rated free theme compatible with the Gutenberg editor and add it to your library or cart.
tasks.description: Get the highest-rated free theme compatible with the Gutenberg editor and add it to your library or cart.

tasks.instruction: Find a magazine/news theme with dark mode support priced between $40 and $70, view its live demo, then add the best-selling one in that range to your wishlist.
tasks.name: Find a magazine/news theme with dark mode support priced between $40 and $70, view its live demo, then add the best-selling one in that range to your wishlist.
tasks.description: Find a magazine/news theme with dark mode support priced between $40 and $70, view its live demo, then add the best-selling one in that range to your wishlist.

tasks.instruction: Open the installation section of the documentation for a WooCommerce shop theme priced above $60 with a rating between 3.0 and 3.9 stars and at least 20 reviews.
tasks.name: Open the installation section of the documentation for a WooCommerce shop theme priced above $60 with a rating between 3.0 and 3.9 stars and at least 20 reviews.
tasks.description: Open the installation section of the documentation for a WooCommerce shop theme priced above $60 with a rating between 3.0 and 3.9 stars and at least 20 reviews.

tasks.instruction: Switch the store currency to EUR, then add a business/corporate theme priced between €60 and €80 to your cart with quantity 3 and the Business support plan selected.
